news.title: Watch Fed Chair Jerome Powell speak live to an economics class at Harvard
news.summary: This will be one of Powell's final scheduled public appearances before his term ends in May.

news.title: Fed Governor Miran still backs cuts, says interest rates could be 'about a point' lower this year
news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran spoke Monday on CNBC's "Squawk on the Street."

news.title: Bill Ackman says it’s one of the best times in a long time to buy quality stocks
news.summary: Ackman's bullish stance comes at a time when markets have been rattled by rising energy prices and sticky inflation concerns.

news.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.

news.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
news.summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.

news.title: Forex startup OpenFX raises $94 million to expand stablecoin-powered cross-border payments
Quantum risk resurfaces at the worst time for bitcoin, but 1 token is loving it
A quantum computer may need just 10,000 qubits to empty your crypto wallets, researchers say
Bearish sentiment builds in crypto as volatility and hedging rise
David Bailey’s Nakamoto sells roughly 5% of its bitcoin holdings, offloading 284 BTC
